title: Construct and test basic electronic circuits
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Construct and test basic electronic circuits demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to construct basic electronic circuit

pcs.text: Safety and environmental requirements are sourced and interpreted1.2 Task instruction is interpreted and electronic circuit to be worked on is identified 1.3 Manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures for electronic circuitry are sourced and interpreted1.4 Potential hazards and risks associated with task are identified and reported to workplace supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Safety and environmental requirements are sourced and interpreted1.2 Task instruction is interpreted and electronic circuit to be worked on is identified 1.3 Manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures for electronic circuitry are sourced and interpreted1.4 Potential hazards and risks associated with task are identified and reported to workplace supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Safety and environmental requirements are sourced and interpreted1.2 Task instruction is interpreted and electronic circuit to be worked on is identified 1.3 Manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures for electronic circuitry are sourced and interpreted1.4 Potential hazards and risks associated with task are identified and reported to workplace supervisor.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to construct basic electronic circuit

elements.title: Draw circuit diagrams and identify equipment and materials to construct electronic circuit

pcs.text: Electronic circuit diagrams that accurately reflect the circuit specifications are drawn according to manufacturer specifications 2.2 Electronic components are depicted correctly in circuit diagram using standard symbols2.3 Component and material requirements are identified from electronic circuit diagram and recorded
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Electronic circuit diagrams that accurately reflect the circuit specifications are drawn according to manufacturer specifications 2.2 Electronic components are depicted correctly in circuit diagram using standard symbols2.3 Component and material requirements are identified from electronic circuit diagram and recorded?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Electronic circuit diagrams that accurately reflect the circuit specifications are drawn according to manufacturer specifications 2.2 Electronic components are depicted correctly in circuit diagram using standard symbols2.3 Component and material requirements are identified from electronic circuit diagram and recorded.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Draw circuit diagrams and identify equipment and materials to construct electronic circuit

elements.title: Construct electronic circuit

pcs.text: Tools, equipment and electronic components are sourced and selected according to manufacturer specifications and safety requirements3.2 Component manufacturer installation and connection information is read, interpreted and applied3.3 Circuit is constructed using electronic components according to manufacturer specifications and safety requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Tools, equipment and electronic components are sourced and selected according to manufacturer specifications and safety requirements3.2 Component manufacturer installation and connection information is read, interpreted and applied3.3 Circuit is constructed using electronic components according to manufacturer specifications and safety requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Tools, equipment and electronic components are sourced and selected according to manufacturer specifications and safety requirements3.2 Component manufacturer installation and connection information is read, interpreted and applied3.3 Circuit is constructed using electronic components according to manufacturer specifications and safety requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Construct electronic circuit

elements.title: Test electronic circuit

pcs.text: Circuit fault testing equipment is identified and sourced according to workplace procedures, manufacturer specifications and safety requirements4.2 Electronic circuit is tested according to workplace procedures, manufacturer specifications and safety requirements4.3 Faults detected are corrected and circuit is re-tested to confirm their operation4.4 Circuit testing procedures and outcomes are recorded
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Circuit fault testing equipment is identified and sourced according to workplace procedures, manufacturer specifications and safety requirements4.2 Electronic circuit is tested according to workplace procedures, manufacturer specifications and safety requirements4.3 Faults detected are corrected and circuit is re-tested to confirm their operation4.4 Circuit testing procedures and outcomes are recorded?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Circuit fault testing equipment is identified and sourced according to workplace procedures, manufacturer specifications and safety requirements4.2 Electronic circuit is tested according to workplace procedures, manufacturer specifications and safety requirements4.3 Faults detected are corrected and circuit is re-tested to confirm their operation4.4 Circuit testing procedures and outcomes are recorded.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Test electronic circuit

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Final inspection is made to ensure work meets task instruction and workplace standards, and that electronic circuit is constructed ready for use or storage5.2 Work area is cleaned, waste and non-recyclable materials are disposed of, and recyclable material is collected and stored according to environmental requirements and workplace procedures5.3 Tools and equipment are checked and stored according to workplace procedures, or tagged and reported where necessary5.4 Workplace documentation is processed according to workplace procedures
